mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO REVIEW_IMG(REVIEW_ORIGIN_IMG_NAME, REVIEW_ATTACHED_IMG_NAME, REVIEW_NUM) VALUES
(#{img.reviewOriginImgName}, #{img.reviewAttachedImgName}, #{img.reviewNum})
mapper.select: SELECT R.REVIEW_NUM, R.RATING, R.TITLE, R.MEM_ID, R.ITEM_NUM, R.CONTENT, R.READ_CNT, R.CREATE_DATE, RI.REVIEW_IMG_NUM, RI.REVIEW_ORIGIN_IMG_NAME, RI.REVIEW_ATTACHED_IMG_NAME FROM REVIEW R LEFT OUTER JOIN REVIEW_IMG RI ON R.REVIEW_NUM = RI.REVIEW_NUM WHERE R.ITEM_NUM = #{itemNum} ORDER BY R.CREATE_DATE DESC

SELECT R.REVIEW_NUM, R.RATING, R.TITLE, R.MEM_ID, R.ITEM_NUM, R.CONTENT, R.READ_CNT, R.CREATE_DATE, RI.REVIEW_IMG_NUM, RI.REVIEW_ORIGIN_IMG_NAME, RI.REVIEW_ATTACHED_IMG_NAME, I.ITEM_NAME FROM REVIEW R LEFT OUTER JOIN REVIEW_IMG RI ON R.REVIEW_NUM = RI.REVIEW_NUM INNER JOIN ITEM I ON R.ITEM_NUM = I.ITEM_NUM WHERE R.MEM_ID = #{memId} ORDER BY R.CREATE_DATE DESC
